'''yofavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabkhal|sabkhal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-f-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabkhal|sabkhal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yofavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yofavithi|yofavithi]] || [[word:yofaviji|yofaviji]] || [[word:yofavishi|yofavishi]] || [[word:yofaviki|yofaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yofavuthuthu|yofavuthuthu]] || [[word:yofavujuju|yofavujuju]] || [[word:yofavushushu|yofavushushu]] || [[word:yofavukuku|yofavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yofavuthu|yofavuthu]] || [[word:yofavuju|yofavuju]] || [[word:yofavushu|yofavushu]] || [[word:yofavuku|yofavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yofavufthuf|yofavufthuf]] || [[word:yofavufjuf|yofavufjuf]] || [[word:yofavufshuf|yofavufshuf]] || [[word:yofavufkuf|yofavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yofavethe|yofavethe]] || [[word:yofaveje|yofaveje]] || [[word:yofaveshe|yofaveshe]] || [[word:yofaveke|yofaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yofavothotho|yofavothotho]] || [[word:yofavojojo|yofavojojo]] || [[word:yofavoshosho|yofavoshosho]] || [[word:yofavokoko|yofavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yofavotho|yofavotho]] || [[word:yofavojo|yofavojo]] || [[word:yofavosho|yofavosho]] || [[word:yofavoko|yofavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yofavofthof|yofavofthof]] || [[word:yofavofjof|yofavofjof]] || [[word:yofavofshof|yofavofshof]] || [[word:yofavofkof|yofavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yofavÃŸfthÃŸf|yofavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yofavÃŸfjÃŸf|yofavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yofavÃŸfshÃŸf|yofavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yofavÃŸfkÃŸf|yofavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yofavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|yofavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yofavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|yofavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yofavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|yofavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yofavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|yofavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yofavÃŸfthÃŸf|yofavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yofavÃŸfjÃŸf|yofavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yofavÃŸfshÃŸf|yofavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yofavÃŸfkÃŸf|yofavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yofavÃŸfthÃŸf|yofavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yofavÃŸfjÃŸf|yofavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yofavÃŸfshÃŸf|yofavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yofavÃŸfkÃŸf|yofavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yofavÃḊthÃḊ|yofavÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:yofavÃḊjÃḊ|yofavÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:yofavÃḊshÃḊ|yofavÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:yofavÃḊkÃḊ|yofavÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yofavathatha|yofavathatha]] || [[word:yofavajaja|yofavajaja]] || [[word:yofavashasha|yofavashasha]] || [[word:yofavakaka|yofavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yofavatha|yofavatha]] || [[word:yofavaja|yofavaja]] || [[word:yofavasha|yofavasha]] || [[word:yofavaka|yofavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yofavafthaf|yofavafthaf]] || [[word:yofavafjaf|yofavafjaf]] || [[word:yofavafshaf|yofavafshaf]] || [[word:yofavafkaf|yofavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yofavasha|yofavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yofavshÃḋsha|yofavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yofavrosha|yofavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yofavmusha|yofavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yofavyasha|yofavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyofavnkshÃḋsha|goyofavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyofavnkrosha|goyofavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyofavnkmusha|goyofavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyofavnkyasha|goyofavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yofafavasha|yofafavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yofafavshÃḋsha|yofafavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yofafavrosha|yofafavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yofafavmusha|yofafavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yofafavyasha|yofafavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyofafavnkshÃḋsha|goyofafavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyofafavnkrosha|goyofafavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyofafavnkmusha|goyofafavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyofafavnkyasha|goyofafavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yefÃḊvasha|yefÃḊvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yefÃḊvshÃḋsha|yefÃḊvshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yefÃḊvrosha|yefÃḊvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yefÃḊvmusha|yefÃḊvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yefÃḊvyasha|yefÃḊvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyefÃḊvnkshÃḋsha|goyefÃḊvnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyefÃḊvnkrosha|goyefÃḊvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyefÃḊvnkmusha|goyefÃḊvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyefÃḊvnkyasha|goyefÃḊvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yofavasha|yofavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yofavshÃḋsha|yofavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yofavrosha|yofavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yofavmusha|yofavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yofavyasha|yofavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyofavnkshÃḋsha|goyofavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyofavnkrosha|goyofavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyofavnkmusha|goyofavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyofavnkyasha|goyofavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
